title: angelonia crassifolia
intro: Angelonia crassifolia, also known as Mexican Angel Trumpet, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, attributed with medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Its health benefits include treating respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems, as well as being used as a natural remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Angelonia crassifolia involve infusions and decoctions, where the plant's leaves and flowers are boiled in water to create a tea for medicinal purposes.
